title: What is it?
description: Allows to search any item/block/entity on minecraft.wiki
body:
**Recommended to use [Hey Wiki](https://modrinth.com/mod/hey-wiki) instead!**

Allows to search any block/entity that player is looking on or item on cursor on [minecraft.wiki](https://minecraft.wiki/) by pressing a keybing (by default 'O')

Works for every language, that Minecraft Wiki supports. Other languages will use translation key for search.
